news.t: Globalization Is Over. It's Time to Embrace the Winners.

overview.description: The State Street SPDR Bloomberg Emerging Markets USD Bond ETF (EMHC) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in broad credit fixed income. The fund tracks a broad market-value-weighted index of USD-denominated debt issued by sovereign and quasi-sovereign issuers from emerging markets. EMHC was launched on Apr 6, 2021 and is issued by State Street.
infoTable: Bloomberg Emerging Market USD Sovereign & Sovereign Owned

data.title: Globalization Is Over. It's Time to Embrace the Winners.
data.text: As the world pulls in, emerging market bonds look like a once-in-a-generation opportunity. Here are the ETFs to buy.
